name: No-Oil Pizza Crust for Large-Loaf Bread Machines
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the bread machine on white bread - manual setting and dump ingredients in according to your machine's preferences.
2. When the cycle is all done, remove and separate into 3-4 balls of dough. Place on floured wax paper and let rise for about 20 minutes more (add a little flour if dough is too sticky).
3. Shape, top, and bake until done in a very hot oven (mine goes to 550 degrees).
Title: No-Oil Pizza Crust for Small Bread Machines
1. After the cycle is done, cut into 4 portions; cover with plastic wrap and let rise for 20 minutes.
2. Shape, top, and bake 12-15 minutes in a 500 degree oven.
